codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: subtree move behavior is implemented in OrgChartView and HierarchyView, cycle-preventing checks are present, confirmation dialog includes affected counts, subtree drag feedback is present in both views, and move operations route through existing moveEmployee undo/redo flow. Tests were added for subtree utilities and subtree move semantics/cycle checks.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit af7e27c diff. No actionable blocking or non-blocking defects were identified for subtree-reorg.
